V-M-062.purpose: Verify Phase-44 email onboarding, password policy, password reset, and duplicate-email UX without changing deploy/install scripts.
V-M-062.checks: Branded email templates render safely, registration copy is accurate, weak passwords are rejected, reset tokens are one-time and TTL-bound, duplicate registration offers recovery, and secrets/tokens remain redacted.

phase-44-gates.gate-1: Verification and reset emails include branded HTML and text fallback while never logging full links or tokens.
phase-44-gates.gate-2: Pending-registration UI tells users to check spam and contains no stale "trial на 3 дня" or immediate VPN claim.
phase-44-gates.gate-3: Strong-password validation is deterministic for registration and reset flows on backend and frontend.
phase-44-gates.gate-4: Password reset request, success, expired, replay, and invalid token states are covered.
phase-44-gates.gate-5: Duplicate-email registration returns a clear account-exists message with reset CTA and no extra side effects.

scenarios.scenario-1: Strong-password registration sends branded verification email and shows spam-folder guidance.
scenarios.scenario-2: Weak-password registration is rejected before pending registration or provider send side effects.
scenarios.scenario-3: Password reset token changes password once and authenticates with the new password.
scenarios.scenario-4: Expired or replayed reset token cannot change password again.
scenarios.scenario-5: Existing-email registration suggests password recovery without creating duplicate pending access.

commands.command: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_email_delivery.py tests/test_verified_registration.py tests/test_password_recovery.py -v

python3 -m xml.etree.ElementTree docs/plans/Phase-44.xml docs/modules/M-062.xml docs/verification/V-M-062.xml docs/graph-index.xml docs/plan-index.xml docs/verification-index.xml docs/requirements.xml docs/current-status.xml

redaction.item-1: No verification token, reset token, Resend API key, bearer header, or full verification/reset link may appear in logs, test output, or smoke output.
redaction.item-2: Provider errors are normalized before reaching user-facing responses.
